title: 4个月内裁员3万人后，公司要求“一切都用人工智能”，员工抱怨道：“现在我的工作就是修复被人工智能弄乱的代码。”
description: “那些留下来的人需要更加努力地工作。”
titleZh: 4个月内裁员3万人后，公司要求“一切都用人工智能”，员工抱怨道：“现在我的工作就是修复被人工智能弄乱的代码。”
titleEn: After laying off 30,000 people in 4 months, the company demands "use AI for everything," employees complain: "Now my job is fixing code messed up by AI."
descriptionZh: “那些留下来的人需要更加努力地工作。”
descriptionEn: "Those who remain are required to work even harder."

title: 押宝AI：印度两大教育公司拟合并，打造从K12到终身学习的超级平台。

title: 这一次，黄仁勋谈论的不是芯片，而是人工智能的资金流向。

descriptionZh: NVIDIA CEO黄仁勋在2026年GTC大会上的核心观点，强调AI行业从模型训练到推理应用的重大转变。
descriptionEn: The core viewpoint of NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang at the 2026 GTC conference, emphasizing the significant shift in the AI industry from model training to inference applications.

title: 刚刚，NVIDIA的龙虾登场，黄仁勋频频豪言壮语，“人类、汽车、家庭、世界、芯片”瞄准万亿营收。

titleEn: Just now, NVIDIA's lobster made an appearance, Jensen Huang made frequent bold statements, "Human, Car, Home, World, Chip" aiming for trillion-dollar revenue.

The next six months may permanently rewrite human civilization.
